options.content: # RIM - Panel for LoRaWAN KPIs (Key Performance Indicators)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "f_cnt")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "last_f_cnt"}) // Optional: Rename the column for clarity
  |> yield(name: "last_value")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rssi")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "last_f_cnt"}) // Optional: Rename the column for clarity
  |> yield(name: "last_value")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "snr")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "last_f_cnt"}) // Optional: Rename the column for clarity
  |> yield(name: "last_value")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_frmpayload_data_gpsLocation_4_location")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "latitude")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_frmpayload_data_gpsLocation_4_location")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "longitude")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_frmpayload_data_gpsLocation_4_altitude")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "f_cnt")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rssi")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "snr")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rssi")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "snr")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

import "date"

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink" or r["_measurement"] == "device_frmpayload_data_gpsLocation_4_location")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "snr" or r["_field"] == "latitude" or r["_field"] == "longitude")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _time: date.truncate(t: r._time, unit: 1s) }))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop", "_measurement", "type", "_measurement"])

import "date"

from(bucket: "rim-bucket")
  |> range(start: -60s)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "device_uplink" or r["_measurement"] == "device_frmpayload_data_gpsLocation_4_location")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rssi" or r["_field"] == "latitude" or r["_field"] == "longitude")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    r with
    _time: date.truncate(t: r._time, unit: 1s),
    _value: float(v: r._value)  //  Explicitly convert to float
  }))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop", "_measurement", "type", "_measurement"])
